8:["$","$L18",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# OpenAI embeddings (default)\nmem = Memory(embedding_model=\"text-embedding-3-small\")\n\n# Or use local embeddings (no API calls)\nmem = Memory(\n  embedding_model=\"sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2\",\n  local_embeddings=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
